coachsPage.title: Your AI Coaches
coachsPage.subtitle: Alex and Julie know your profile, goals, and preferences. Ask them anything, they're here for you.
coachsPage.alexDesc: Alex is your personal sport coach available 24/7. He knows your level, equipment, and goals. He adapts your sessions in real time and answers all your training questions.
coachsPage.adaptsSessionsDesc: Based on your form, available time, and daily constraints
coachsPage.alternativesDesc: In case of pain, fatigue, or lack of equipment
coachsPage.julieDesc: Julie is your personal nutritionist. She knows your caloric goals, dietary restrictions, and preferences. She helps you create adapted meals and generates your shopping list.
coachsPage.generatesRecipesDesc: Personalized to your tastes and macros
coachsPage.shoppingListDesc: Optimized for the week with estimated budget
coachsPage.ctaDesc: Alex and Julie are waiting to accompany you in your transformation. Start your free trial and ask them your first question.
